svg.title: Automation Flow
svg.desc: Phase-based automation flow for the Calabi OpenShift lab, from outer infrastructure through bootstrap, bastion-side lab work, and cluster plus day-2 operations.

path.aria-label: Create the substrate and land on the metal host
This phase creates the public-cloud network and the metal instance, then hands off to the operator-facing bootstrap path.

g.aria-label: VPC, subnet, routing, and thepersistent public endpoint.
Creates `virt-01`, first boot config,and the guest volume substrate.

path.aria-label: Prepare the host, build bastion, then stage onto bastion

g.aria-label: This is the transition from generic infrastructure to a usable lab environment.The operator still drives from the workstation, then hands execution into the management network.
Outside-facing orchestrationfrom the operator workstation.
KVM, libvirt, OVS, NAT, RHSM,updates, Cockpit, and host policy.
Create `bastion-01` as theinside-facing execution host.
Refresh the staged repo, secrets,and helper shell environment.

path.aria-label: Build support services and prepare the installer inputs

g.aria-label: Once bastion is staged, the work shifts inside the management network.This phase runs optional AD, IdM, trust, bastion join, mirror registry, DNS, and installer prep.
Main bastion-side entrypointfor inside-facing lab work.
ad-server.yml · idm.ymlidm-ad-trust.yml · bastion-join.yml
Optional AD then IdM, trust,and bastion enrollment.
mirror-registry.yml ·openshift-dns.yml
Build Quay, reassert DNS, andpublish cluster records into IdM.
installer-binaries.yml · install-artifacts.ymlagent-media.yml
Download tools, render cluster config,and generate or publish the agent ISO.

path.aria-label: Create the cluster, wait for install completion, then converge auth and day-2

g.aria-label: The last phase builds the guest shells, waits for the OpenShift install to converge, removes install media,and lands on the validated baseline: OpenShift breakglass plus Keycloak OIDC, AAP Keycloak OIDC, and the default day-2 operators.
Create the nine guest shells andattach agent boot media.
install-wait.yml ·detach-install-media.yml
Wait for install completion,then restore disk-first boot intent.
Breakglass, Keycloak OIDC, AAP OIDC,operators, and the validation lane.
Keep teardown as thereset path.
